texto: Do not consider despair as a thick and high wall standing on your way
autor: it is just a darkness and you can still walk in the darkness till you reach the light!
explicacao: Citação de it is just a darkness and you can still walk in the darkness till you reach the light! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Do not consider despair as a thick and high wall standing on your way” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, consider em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
